commands.review_summary:
The branch changes heartbeat outbound delivery to use the isolated run session key while retaining the base key as policy context, plus focused heartbeat and outbound media-policy tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +231. Total +234 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes the heartbeat agent turn through runSessionKey but still builds outbound delivery metadata from the base sessionKey. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No repair lane is needed because the PR is already the focused replacement path; maintainers should review and land it after required checks.

target.title: fix(heartbeat): route outbound mirror to isolated session key
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing contributor PR #67398 by rebasing onto current main.
- Keep outbound heartbeat delivery metadata keyed to the isolated runSessionKey when heartbeat.isolatedSession is true.
- Preserve delivery target and policy semantics while proving transcript mirror/session hook routing uses the isolated :heartbeat key.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/heartbeat-runner.isolated-session-mirror.test.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.isolated-key-stability.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge.

## Credit
This continues @agent-merkava's source PR at https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67398; keep contributor attribution on the repaired branch and changelog entry.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-143801-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67398
- Credit: Repair the existing #67398 contributor branch and preserve @agent-merkava as the PR author.; If repair requires additional commits, state that the original one-line fix and mirror regression came from @agent-merkava in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67398.; Do not close #67398 as superseded unless a later replacement PR exists and explicitly carries source PR credit.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/heartbeat-runner.isolated-session-mirror.test.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.isolated-key-stability.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #67398 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against eb04aad6e069.
